<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason>
Player RED is offering me 1 Dollar with no reciprocity or future incentive. Since there are no future games and my utility is purely zero-sum in this round, rejecting would result in both losing all resources, which is worse than accepting nothing now (but at least securing 1 Dollar). While the trade is still unfavorable (RED gains nothing, BLUE gains 1 Dollar), it's better than nothing, and the asymmetry of moves (RED has 4 total moves, BLUE only 4 but must accept/reject on the last) suggests RED might escalate demands later. Accepting now locks in a small gain and prevents worse offers. Since BLUE cannot propose trades on MOVE 4/4, accepting is the safest move here.
</reason>
